channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Coal mine explosion in China kills 90 people, state media say - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Iran Update Special Report, May 22, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Iran Update Special Report, May 22, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  2. Iran war timeline and key moments, explained  CNN
  3. Iran war updates: Lebanon ‘ceasefire’ extended, Israel launches new attacks  Al Jazeera
  4. Iran War | US Iran War News: US prepares for new military strikes against Iran as talks continue, says report  The Times of India
  5. The War Room newsletter: Why the Iran conflict may reignite  economist.com
item.source: Institute for the Study of War

item.title: Ukraine strikes Russian FSB headquarters in occupied Kherson Oblast, killing and injuring nearly 100 troops - The Kyiv Independent
item.description:
1. Ukraine strikes Russian FSB headquarters in occupied Kherson Oblast, killing and injuring nearly 100 troops  The Kyiv Independent
  2. Ukraine claims it killed scores of Russians in two strikes in occupied regions  CNN
  3. "Russian losses amount to around 100": Ukrainian drones strike FSB HQ in occupied Kherson Oblast – video  Українська правда
  4. Drone Strike Destroys FSB Headquarters with Dozens of Invaders on the Arabat Spit  Мілітарний
  5. Ukrainian forces strike Russian ammo depots, air defenses, command posts, and troops  Ukrinform - Ukrainian National News Agency

item.title: Putin wants war concluded this year on victorious terms including Donbas, Bloomberg reports - Euromaidan Press
item.description:
1. Putin wants war concluded this year on victorious terms including Donbas, Bloomberg reports  Euromaidan Press
  2. Bloomberg: Putin wants to conclude war by year's end but only on terms he considers victorious for Russia  Українська правда
  3. Is Russia ‘simulating diplomacy’ because of war losses in Ukraine?  Al Jazeera
  4. Putin Might Finally Need to Find Peace, But Not With Team Trump’s Incompetent Help  Kyiv Post
  5. Pulling up a chair – Foreign and security policy  ips-journal.eu

item.title: US said to fire more interceptors to protect Israel in latest Iran war than Israel did - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. US said to fire more interceptors to protect Israel in latest Iran war than Israel did  The Times of Israel
  2. U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show  The Washington Post
  3. Damning Pentagon Leak Reveals Huge Blow to U.S. Defenses  Yahoo News Canada
  4. US ‘lost half of its interceptor missiles’ defending Israel from Iran  The Telegraph
  5. Pentagon officials worry about Israel's reliance on US interceptors in Iran war  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: Who’s to Blame When an Ivy League President Drives Into His Students? - The Ringer
item.description: Who’s to Blame When an Ivy League President Drives Into His Students?  The Ringer

item.title: In West Bank, Latest Victim of Israeli Settler Violence Shocks in a New Way - The New York Times
item.description:
1. In West Bank, Latest Victim of Israeli Settler Violence Shocks in a New Way  The New York Times
  2. Empathy Toward a Dog but Not Palestinian Kids: Israelis' Selective Compassion  Haaretz
  3. Israeli settler filmed throwing concrete block at cats days after dog beating  Middle East Eye
  4. Settler filmed clubbing dog to death in central West Bank Palestinian village  The Times of Israel
  5. Palestinian-owned dog survives after Israeli settler beating  The New Arab
